vocab.meaning: ủng hộ, cổ vũ cho (một đội hoặc cá nhân)
vocab.example: I've been rooting for my local football team since I was a child, regardless of their performance.

vocab.meaning: hò reo cổ vũ nhiệt tình
vocab.example: There's nothing quite like being in a stadium and cheering on your favorite players with thousands of other fans.
I find it exhilarating to watch two powerhouse teams face off in a high-stakes championship final.

vocab.meaning: thành công thực hiện một điều khó khăn (thắng ngược, lội ngược dòng)
vocab.example: It's truly inspiring when an underdog team manages to pull off a stunning victory against the favorites.

vocab.meaning: tin tưởng, trông cậy vào (sự phối hợp đồng đội)
vocab.example: In team sports, players must be able to count on each other to execute complex tactical maneuvers.

vocab.meaning: đối mặt, thi đấu chống lại (đối thủ mạnh)
vocab.example: The tension is palpable when a young, inexperienced team has to go up against the reigning champions.
While I enjoy the team aspect, I also love watching star athletes who stand out due to their exceptional skills.

vocab.meaning: mang lại, dẫn đến (sự đoàn kết, cảm xúc)
vocab.example: International tournaments like the World Cup bring about a unique sense of national pride and unity.

vocab.meaning: may mắn có được kết quả tốt
vocab.example: Sometimes a team might luck out with a last-minute penalty, which adds a layer of unpredictability to the game.

vocab.meaning: thất bại, không diễn ra như ý (chiến thuật bị phá sản)
vocab.example: It’s fascinating to see how a team reacts when their initial game plan falls through due to the opponent's pressure.
